## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential content marketing collaboration between ProcurePro and GrowthX (fwd.digital)](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a hybrid AI-human content creation process, with significant editor involvement](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Typical onboarding takes 3-4 weeks, aiming to publish content by week 4](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [GrowthX recommends starting with editorial content over programmatic for ProcurePro, given their current position](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - [ProcurePro plans to make a decision soon, likely within a week](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Utilizes AI with significant human editor involvement at every step](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Starts with company research, persona development, and topic ideation](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Employs custom research agents to gather specific information](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Allows for multiple feedback points and stylistic adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Typical article length: 1,500-3,000 words, sometimes up to 4,000-5,000](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Includes image generation capabilities, though complex infographics require separate design work](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)

### Onboarding and Calibration

  - [Week 1: Deep dive into client's business](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Week 2: Strategy alignment and opportunity identification](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Week 3-4: Content calibration and initial publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Calibration involves creating sample content, gathering feedback, and adjusting guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Collaborative use of Notion for information gathering and strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)

### Performance Metrics and Reporting

  - [Focus on indexing, impressions, and clicks as leading indicators](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Aims for significant traffic increases (e.g., 5x) over 5-6 months, depending on domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Considers factors like backlinks (ProcurePro has \~940) and domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Offers link acquisition services to boost authority](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Content Strategy Recommendation

  - [Marcel recommends starting with 80% editorial content for ProcurePro](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - [Suggests validating topics and building authority before considering programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [Aligns with ProcurePro's recent hiring of a content marketing person](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)

## Next Steps

  - [ProcurePro to have internal discussions, particularly regarding finances](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [ProcurePro to make a decision, aiming for this week or early next week](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [Both parties to keep each other updated on any changes or additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/Axd9nFwVWPQJdweCSwyaHutxywGv_VNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
